result.summary: Created 4 CI/CD files. deploy.yml: GitHub Actions workflow on push to main (website/** paths) + manual dispatch, Node 20 setup, npm ci, Astro build, rsync deploy to OCI VM via SSH secrets. build-wasm.yml: reusable workflow with 3 parallel jobs (Emscripten C++, pygbag Python, Maven Java). Copied deploy.yml to .github/workflows/. Updated .gitignore with website build artifacts and WASM output paths.
